name: Homepage
description: Full marketing homepage with hero-to-footer section flow
responsive_strategy: Sections stack vertically on mobile. Feature grid collapses from 3-4 columns to 1. Hero image scales or stacks below text.

name: Responsive Grid
description: 12-column responsive grid system with breakpoint-specific column counts
responsive_strategy: Desktop: 12 columns 24px gutter. Tablet: 8 columns 16px gutter. Mobile: 4 columns 16px gutter.

name: Animation Patterns
description: Scroll reveal stagger and hover lift animation patterns
responsive_strategy: Reduce all animations to opacity-only for prefers-reduced-motion.

name: Form
description: Vertical stack of labeled inputs with consistent spacing and validation
responsive_strategy: Single column. Submit button full-width on mobile. Max-width 640px.

name: Authentication
description: Sign in sign up and password reset flows with centered card layout
responsive_strategy: Centered card max-width 420px. Stacks naturally on all viewports.

name: Dashboard
description: Side navigation plus header bar plus content area for data-rich apps
responsive_strategy: Sidebar collapses to icons at 1024px then off-canvas at 768px. Stat cards collapse from 4-col to 2-col to 1-col.

name: Empty State
description: Centered illustration or icon with headline description and action button
responsive_strategy: Naturally centered and responsive at all sizes.
best_for: First-time users;Empty search results;Error states;No permissions

name: Settings Page
description: Sidebar sub-navigation plus form content area for app settings
responsive_strategy: Settings nav becomes top tabs on mobile. Content single-column at all sizes. Max-width 768px.

name: Pricing Page
description: Pricing tiers with comparison toggle and feature lists
responsive_strategy: Cards stack to single column on mobile. Toggle stays centered. FAQ accordion below.

name: Blog Layout
description: Narrow centered content column with optional sidebar
responsive_strategy: Content max-width 768px centered. Sidebar stacks below content on mobile.

name: Product Detail
description: Split layout with product images and purchase details
responsive_strategy: Images and info stack vertically on mobile. Gallery becomes horizontal scroll.

name: Search Results
description: Filtered list or grid of search results with faceted navigation
responsive_strategy: Filters collapse to drawer on mobile. Grid collapses from multi-column to single.

name: Onboarding
description: Multi-step wizard with progress indicator and contextual guidance
responsive_strategy: Steps stack naturally. Progress indicator stays at top. Full-width buttons on mobile.

name: Error Page
description: Branded error page with helpful navigation back to working state
responsive_strategy: Centered layout works at all sizes.
dont_use_for: In-app error states — use Alert or Toast

name: Notification Center
description: Dropdown or sidebar panel showing notification list with read/unread states
responsive_strategy: Dropdown becomes full-screen sheet on mobile.
